name: Mikanko Fire Soul
desc: The equipped monster cannot be destroyed by card effects. During the Main Phase: You can send this card and the monster equipped with this card to the GY; Special Summon up to 2 "Mikanko" monsters from your Deck and/or GY (max. 1 from your Deck and 1 from your GY). You can only use this effect of "Mikanko Fire Soul" once per turn.
